$comment: Locveil design tokens — PROD-10 style council, 2026-07-14. Mirror of tokens/locveil.css (hand-synced until ui-kit-v1 wires a generator). hsl triplets unless noted.

type.numeric: tabular-nums for readings; mono for code; 8px micro-size DROPPED

density: compact — inputs px-3 py-2 text-sm class; operator-tool bias

icons.policy: SPLIT (council round 1): lucide stroke-2 in workbench/chrome; Material filled stays inside the remote island; backend layout-manifest icon names remain a Material-namespace contract until the island rebuild (bridge session) — any family change there needs a name-mapping layer
icons.sizes: 16px inline / 20px buttons / island per-zone (size-prop redesign owed at ui-kit)

status.recipeLight: bg h 70% 96% · border h 45% 80% · text h 55% 32%
status.testedNote: tested stays BLUE next to the blue accent — owner ruling, round 2

themePolicy: dual theme from day one; .dark class strategy; island theme-independent
base: shadcn/ui + radix (D9 ratified); fluid-remote requirement D10 — implementation in a dedicated bridge wireframe session
